name: STRUCTURED PRODUCTS CORP CRED ENHANCE CORTS TR FOR AON CAP A
summary: Structured Products Corp Credit Enhanced CORTS Trust for AON Cap A (ticker: KTN) is a statutory trust that issues certificates representing investors' interests in the Trust. The Certificates are listed on the New York Stock Exchange and held through The Depository Trust Company via its nominee Cede & Co. The Trust makes periodic distributions to certificate holders, with distribution statements filed on Form 8-K.
